package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_lookup_double_access: `if _, ok := m[k]; ok { v := m[k] }` - two map lookups for the same key
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule616NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario616Negative(records []Rule616NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
